title: macrotyloma uniflorum var. benadirianum
intro: Macrotyloma uniflorum var. benadirianum, also known as the Benadir horse gram or Benadir cluster bean, is a variety of the Macrotyloma uniflorum plant, a legume native to the Indian subcontinent. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antidiabetic activities. The health benefits associated with Macrotyloma uniflorum var. benadirianum include reducing blood sugar levels, improving lipid profiles, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional Ayurvedic medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, decoctions, and powders, which are consumed to alleviate various health issues.
